The '''''Booty Full''''' was a [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] [[Starship/Legends|ship]] under the command of [[Phan Riizolo]], who worked with the [[Invids]]. The Invids were a pirate organization led by [[Leonia Tavira]] and in opposition to the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. The ''Booty Full'' was a modified [[Bulk cruiser/Legends|bulk cruiser]] which carried a complement of eighteen [[Clutch (fighter)|Clutches]] attached to its outer hull. During the [[Battle of Alakatha]] in [[11 ABY/Legends|11 ABY]], it was captured by [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] above the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Alakatha/Legends|Alakatha]] as it was attempting to raid the ''[[Glitterstar]]'', a [[Luxury liner/Legends|luxury liner]]. While all of its fighters were destroyed in the battle, the ship itself was captured intact. After its capture, the ''Booty Full''{{'s}} [[Captain/Legends|captain]] provided the [[New Republic Intelligence Service]] with intelligence on [[Leonia Tavira]].<ref name="I,Jedi" />

==Behind the scenes==
The ''Booty Full'' was created for ''[[I, Jedi]]'', which was written by [[Michael A. Stackpole]] and was published on [[May 4]], [[1998]].

==Appearances==
*''[[I, Jedi]]'' {{Ab|I, Jedi (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
